marketplace.name: local-skills
marketplace.description: Reusable skills discovered across local projects.

plugins.name: dynamodb-single-table
plugins.description: Designs DynamoDB tables using single table design with generic keys, co-located entities, and GSI overloading.
plugins.author: myskills

plugins.name: nodejs-security
plugins.description: Writes secure Node.js applications by default, applying OWASP Top 10 mitigations, input validation, and safe authentication.
plugins.author: myskills

plugins.name: csv-to-excel-report
plugins.description: Generates styled Excel reports from CSV data, merging transactions with targets and calculating KPIs into a formatted .xlsx workbook.
plugins.author: myskills

plugins.name: context-audit
plugins.description: Analyzes all Claude Code context sources for conflicts, overlapping skill triggers, and ambiguity.
plugins.author: myskills

plugins.name: pdlc
plugins.description: Orchestrates a three-phase product development lifecycle workflow (Product, Architecture, Build) with human decision gates on local HTML pages.
plugins.author: pdlc

plugins.name: speckit-specify
plugins.description: Creates or updates a feature specification from a natural language feature description in a spec-kit project structure.
plugins.author: learnsdd

plugins.name: explain-code-spanish
plugins.description: Explains code in both English and Spanish to support bilingual developer learning.
plugins.author: mindmap
